short_description: KC's entertainment epicenter — live music, sports bars, and nightlife in the heart of downtown.
long_description:
The Power & Light District is downtown Kansas City's premier entertainment hub, a purpose-built blocks-long complex of bars, restaurants, and live entertainment venues centered around the KC Live! outdoor stage. On any given weekend night it's one of the liveliest spots in the metro, drawing crowds for concerts, watch parties, and bar-hopping. 

KC Live! itself hosts free outdoor concerts and events throughout the year on a large open-air stage surrounded by venues. No Other Pub by Sporting KC is the go-to spot for soccer fans, with tons of screens, cold beer, and a loyal KC Current and Sporting KC following. 

Howl at the Moon brings its signature dueling pianos concept to the district, creating a high-energy singalong atmosphere that's a reliable good time. Just off the main strip, Palm Tree Club KC offers a more tropical-themed escape with a full food menu, craft cocktails, and a lively late-night scene.

locations.formatted_address: 13 Grand Blvd, Kansas City, MO 64106, USA
locations.name: KC Live!
locations.notes: The heart of the Power & Light District — an open-air entertainment block with a large stage, giant screens, and surrounding bars and restaurants. Hosts concerts, watch parties, and major events.

locations.formatted_address: Located in the, 1370 Grand Blvd, Kansas City, MO 64106, USA
locations.name: No Other Pub by Sporting KC
locations.notes: Massive Sporting KC-branded sports bar in Power & Light with multiple levels, bowling, simulator games, craft drinks, and bar food.

locations.formatted_address: 1334 Grand Blvd, Kansas City, MO 64106, USA
locations.name: Howl at the Moon Kansas City
locations.notes: High-energy dueling piano bar in Power & Light with live requests, crowd sing-alongs, and a party atmosphere that runs late.

locations.formatted_address: 14 E 14th St, Kansas City, MO 64106, USA
locations.name: Palm Tree Club KC
locations.notes: Stylish restaurant and nightclub in the Power & Light area with an Asian-inspired menu — sushi, bao buns, yakitori — plus craft cocktails and a vibrant late-night scene.
